data.title: What's Going On With Bitcoin Mining Stock CleanSpark Thursday?
data.description: CleanSpark Inc (NASDAQ:CLSK) shares are bouncing around in early trading. The company on Thursday announced that it achieved 30 EH/s in operational hashrate.

data.title: Amazon Prime Big Deal Days 2024 Scores Record-Breaking Sales
data.description: Amazon shares are trading higher Thursday. The company announced that Prime Big Deal Days was its biggest October shopping event ever. Here's what to know:

data.title: Unpacking the Latest Options Trading Trends in Costco Wholesale
Eli Lilly Issues Cease-And-Desist Letters to Compounders Over Weight-Loss Drug Copies As Shortage Resolves
data.description: Eli Lilly intensifies its legal efforts against compounding pharmacies producing copycat versions of its weight-loss drugs, Mounjaro and Zepbound, after the FDA declares the tirzepatide shortage resolved. Regulatory and patient concerns arise over the decision.

data.title: What's Going On With Costco Stock Thursday?
data.description: Costco Wholesale Corp (NASDAQ:COST) shares are getting a lift Thursday after the company reported sales results for September. Multiple analysts raised price targets on the membership-based retailer's stock following the sales update.
